title: Embedded Systems
description: Introduction to embedded systems design covering microcontroller programming, real-time systems, hardware-software interfaces, and IoT applications. Students program ARM-based microcontrollers using C and assembly, interface with sensors and actuators, and learn about real-time operating systems (RTOS). Lab work involves hands-on projects with development boards. CS201 is required for data structures knowledge and C programming proficiency needed for systems-level embedded programming.
outcomes: Build IoT prototypes with sensor networks
